label: 생성
prompt:
GOVERNING: Single-focus full-bleed editorial news-card background illustration, vertical 4:5 portrait, one decisive moment filling the whole frame edge to edge with no empty bands or letterbox.
STYLE: korean manhwa style serious drama illustration, sharp black ink outlines with varying line weight, precise anatomical rendering, screentone shading, cel-shaded color with defined edges, high contrast chiaroscuro, muted desaturated palette with selective color accents, heavy atmosphere.
SCENE: A desolate pre-dawn provincial Korean street in Gyeongsan, a lone anonymous faceless young man staggering unsteadily down the empty asphalt rendered as a dark hunched backlit silhouette with slumped shoulders and one limp trembling hand, a white Korean police patrol car with a blue-and-red roof bar idling only a few meters away yet rolling on without stopping, the officers' dim faces motionless behind the windshield, shuttered low-rise storefronts and distant shop signs dissolving into soft out-of-focus illegible shapes.
CAMERA: Low street-level wide shot from just behind and beside the staggering figure, the patrol car angled across the mid-ground, deep focus holding both the silhouette and the inert car sharp.
FOCUS: Focal weight on the charged empty asphalt gap between the broken staggering silhouette and the idle unresponsive patrol car.
LIGHT: Cold blue pre-dawn twilight, harsh headlights raking from behind the figure to throw one long stark shadow toward camera, faint red-and-blue roo

label: 생성
prompt:
GOVERNING: A decisive midnight standoff — two opposing groups of coated figures locked mid-confrontation in the open yard before a looming harbor warehouse, frozen in the held breath before anyone moves.
STYLE: korean webtoon serious drama illustration, bold clean ink lines, dramatic high-contrast shading, intense emotional expression, hardboiled assassin-thriller gekiga, cold cinematic framing, chiseled stoic faces, precise mechanical detail, ruthless noir tension
SCENE: a rain-slicked container port at deep night, a towering corrugated-steel warehouse with its loading door half rolled up, stacked shipping containers, mooring bollards and coiled ropes, wet asphalt mirroring sparse sodium lamps, distant gantry cranes over black water, with warehouse signage rendered as soft unreadable shapes far in the background.
CAMERA: wide low-angle establishing shot with long-lens compression and a faint Dutch tilt, both factions held at mid-distance within a single frame.
FOCUS: the charged empty gap between the two lead silhouettes at dead center, bodies angled in a taut face-off, everything else sinking into shadow around them.
LIGHT: backlit silhouette with rim light, faces in shadow, no facial features visible, harsh sodium-vapor glow flaring from behind, deep blue-black shadows, thin mist catching the beams.
MOOD: tense, high-stakes urgency
COMPOSITION: the two groups squared off left versus right across a dark central void, the warehouse mass filling the upper background, one cent

label: 생성
prompt:
GOVERNING: A decisive dawn moment on a Han River bridge in Seoul — a thin single-file line of morning commuters crossing the pedestrian walkway, half-dissolved in rolling fog, while one lone figure stands paused mid-step at the railing, turned away from the crowd toward the grey water below.
STYLE: soft watercolor illustration, translucent layered washes, delicate brush strokes, muted emotional palette, subtle paper texture, korean ink-wash (sumuk) painting with sparse watercolor accents, generous white space, rendered in korean webtoon (manhwa) visual grammar — clean confident digital ink outlines, cel-shaded color with defined edges, subtle screentone shading accents, polished webtoon finish
SCENE: commuters in dark overcoats with bags and backpacks walking in a loose receding column over the bridge deck, their silhouettes softening into mist, tall suspension cables and steel railing fading upward into pale emptiness, the still cold river barely visible beneath; a purely visual wordless composition with only indistinct, unreadable signage shapes lost in the far haze.
CAMERA: low eye-level three-quarter view looking down the length of the walkway, wide lens stretching the receding line of figures into the fog toward a distant vanishing point.
FOCUS: the single paused commuter in the near-middle ground at the railing, rendered sharpest and most defined against the dissolving anonymous crowd.
LIGHT: pale blue pre-sunrise dawn, diffuse fog-scattered ambient light with no direct

label: 생성
prompt:
GOVERNING: A single decisive news moment — an unbroken column of anonymous citizens under dark umbrellas moving across the rain-flooded stone plaza of Gwanghwamun at night, read instantly as an ordinary crowd caught mid-march, never a posed or staged tableau.
STYLE: reportage press photograph, natural available light, documentary realism, front-page news immediacy, unposed subjects caught mid-action — not a staged studio portrait or magazine editorial.
SCENE: dozens of ordinary people file in a steady procession under beaded black umbrellas through heavy night rain, their backs and shoulders reduced to near-black silhouettes against a haze of distant traffic and building glow, the historic Gwanghwamun gate softening into rain-blurred depth behind them, and all distant signage reading only as soft glowing color held as pure background texture.
CAMERA: shot on a full-frame body with an 85mm lens at eye level, slight telephoto compression stacking the umbrella line into a dense receding column, handheld with faint motion in the falling rain, f/2.8, natural high-ISO grain of a real night news frame.
FOCUS: sharpest on the nearest two or three umbrella silhouettes in the foreground, focus falling off gently into the rain-softened depth of the marching crowd.
LIGHT: cold blue night ambience cut by scattered warm sodium streetlamps and shopfront glow, light raking off wet umbrella domes and the mirror-like flooded granite, long reflections streaking across the plaza, no studio fill.
